project_type: MQL5 Expert Advisor + Python ML bridge trading system
build_system: No formal build system. Bat files download and run Python scripts. MQL5 compiled in MetaEditor.
test_framework: pytest (tests/ directories in each python_bridge variant)
verification_instructions: 1. Verify NeuroX/ folder structure mirrors old layout. 2. Verify bat files reference correct new paths and GitHub URLs. 3. Verify CSV filenames (python_bridge_signal.csv etc.) are NOT renamed. 4. Verify EA files have updated header comments but preserve all CSV filename references.
setup_instructions: N/A - file copy/rename operation, no dependencies needed
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET. No MetaEditor available for MQL5 compilation validation. No MT5 available.
contribution_requirements: Do NOT rename bridge protocol CSV filenames (python_bridge_signal.csv, python_bridge_confirm.csv, python_bridge_heartbeat.txt, python_bridge_brain_settings.csv, python_bridge_v3_signal.csv, python_bridge_v3_confirm.csv, python_bridge_v3_tick_data.csv, python_bridge_v3_spread.csv). Do NOT change trading logic. 'input' is reserved in MQL5 - never use as variable name.
key_patterns: Each version (v1, v2, v3) is a self-contained Python package with config/, data/, models/, signals/, strategies/, training/, dashboard/, tests/. Bat files use python urllib to download files from GitHub raw URLs. EA files use InpSignalFile etc. for CSV filenames.
directory_structure: Root has: python_bridge/ (v7.1), python_bridge_v2/ (v7.2-rc1), python_bridge_v3/ (v8.0), 3 EA .mq5 files, 3 update_and_run bat files, 1 setup bat. New NeuroX/ folder will contain: neurox/ (from python_bridge), neurox_v2/ (from python_bridge_v2), neurox_v3/ (from python_bridge_v3), 3 NeuroX_EA_*.mq5 files, 3 neurox_run*.bat files, 1 neurox_setup.bat.
